name: Kam Patterson
bio: Kameron Kam Patterson is an American stand-up comedian and actor from Orlando, Florida, known for high-energy crowd work. He rose to prominence through appearances on the Kill Tony podcast after being discovered in 2023 and toured as one of the Killers of Kill Tony. In 2025 he joined Saturday Night Live as a featured player.

timeline.ev: Begins performing at open mics in Orlando
Breaks out on the Kill Tony podcast
Performs with Kill Tony at Madison Square Garden
Joins Saturday Night Live as a featured player

accolades: Saturday Night Live featured player, season 51 (2025)
